# Create an application

Before using the Sigenergy developer portal APIs, you need to create an application. The application’s **AppKey** identifies the app for authentication when calling APIs.

# Application submission

![pic](https://s3.cn-northwest-1.amazonaws.com.cn/sigen-data-public/576d4528c796402a9f59344e9982ab11.png)

## Purpose (multiple selections allowed)

* **Control:** Used to issue parameters/commands to control Sigenergy devices.
* **Monitoring:** Query the status of Sigenergy devices via APIs, or receive data subscription push from Sigenergy devices.

## Enable VPP dispatch

For developers who are VPP service providers, select the **VPP dispatch** option. Only after enabling this can you perform charge/discharge dispatch actions on Sigenergy devices under the application.

# Application review

After submitting, you can find the application details in the console. The application will be in **“Under review”** status. You will be notified of the result within **3–5 business days**.
